variants.title: HiFi Filter FS 117 Breather Filter | Replaces the MP Filtri SA145G1L40AP01
variants.option1Value: HiFi Filter FS 117 Breather Filter | Replaces the MP Filtri SA145G1L40AP01
variants.description: The genuine HiFi Filter FS 117 Breather Filter is HiFi's replacement to the MP FILTRI SA145G1L40AP01. Easy to install and replace, the FS 117 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.
specifications: Style: BREATHER FILTER, Dimension 1 (D1): 145.0 mm, Dimension 2 (D2): 132.0 mm, Thread 1 (D7): 1"1/2-BSP, Height 1 (H1): 142.0 mm, Height 2 (H2): 117.0 mm
